hero.title: Услуги
hero.subtitle: Структурированные, премиальные ISO‑услуги для сертификации и устойчивого соответствия.
hero.intro: Внешняя экспертиза, адаптированная к вашим процессам, — с прозрачной ответственностью и понятной подачей.

sections.title: ISO Implementation
sections.subtitle: Your path to certification handled with logic and support.
sections.description:
If you know which standard you need but are overwhelmed by the complexity of building the system, our Implementation Support is the solution. We don't just provide templates we act as your outsourced ISO department, working alongside your team to build a system based on your actual operations.

By the end of the process, you will have a fully implemented, audit-ready management system aligned with ISO requirements.
items: Gap Analysis: A deep dive to identify exactly where you stand against the standard.
Documentation Development: Creating lean, practical procedures—no fluff.
Staff Training: Ensuring your team understands, owns, and confidently operates the processes.
Internal Auditing: A rigorous "dry run" to test the system before the official assessment.
Certification Support: Expert on-site presence and guidance during your external audit.
ONGOING SUPPORT: Continuous guidance and hands-on support to ensure your system is effectively implemented and maintained

pricingTimeline.title: Pricing & Timeline
paragraphs: ISO implementation timelines typically range from 3 to 12 months, depending on organisational size, complexity and the maturity of existing processes.

Projects are tailored to each business, with a strong focus on supporting small and medium-sized organisations, including startups. ISOlogic understands the practical and financial constraints these businesses face and delivers solutions that are proportionate, flexible and designed to remain accessible without unnecessary overhead.
A more accurate timeline and cost can be provided following an initial discussion.

sections.title: Internal Auditing
sections.subtitle: Turning a compliance requirement into a business asset.
sections.description:
Internal auditing (first party auditing) is a mandatory requirement to maintain your ISO certification. While some organisations use internal staff, many SMEs benefit from Outsourced Internal Auditing to ensure total objectivity, meet independence requirements, and gain a "fresh set of eyes" on their operations.

Internal audits can be delivered as a one-off service or as part of an ongoing audit programme. ISOlogic offers a flexible, cost-effective approach tailored to your organisation’s size and audit scope.
items: Audit Program Planning: A structured annual schedule to cover all required areas.
Execution & Reporting: Comprehensive audits with clear, actionable findings and root cause analysis.
Corrective Action and Follow-up Support: Practical help on addressing non-conformities.
MANAGEMENT REVIEW SUPPORT: Supporting management review processes with clear insights, audit outputs and practical recommendations.

sections.title: ISO Maintenance (Outsourced QMS / System Manager)
sections.subtitle: Keeping your certification healthy while you focus on growth.
sections.description:
Achieving certification is a major milestone but maintaining it requires continuous attention. Our Maintenance Retainer provides you with an expert "on-call" to manage your system throughout the year, ensuring you stay compliant without overstretching your internal staff.

ISO maintenance support is typically delivered on a flexible monthly basis, tailored to your organisation’s needs and level of support required.
items: Regular System Health Checks: Proactive reviews to prevent "compliance drift."
Surveillance Audit Prep: Ensuring your team and documentation are ready for a third-party audit.
Regulatory & Standard Updates: We monitor changes so you don't have to.
Ongoing Advisory: On-site visits, priority email and phone support for any ISO-related queries.

sections.title: Food Safety & HACCP Compliance
sections.subtitle: Simple, practical guidance to help you meet food safety requirements with confidence.
sections.description:
Setting up or running a food business involves strict regulatory requirements, and understanding HACCP principles can be challenging. ISOlogic provides clear, practical support to help you implement food safety systems that meet PVD (Food and Veterinary Service) requirements in Latvia — without unnecessary complexity.

In addition to HACCP-based systems, ISOlogic supports businesses working towards ISO 22000 Food Safety Management Systems, helping align local PVD requirements with internationally recognised food safety standards.
items: HACCP SYSTEM SETUP: Structured development of your food safety system tailored to your business.
DOCUMENTATION & RECORDS: Preparation of required HACCP documentation, procedures and logs.
PVD COMPLIANCE SUPPORT: Guidance to ensure your business meets local Food and Veterinary Service requirements.
STAFF TRAINING: Practical training to ensure your team understands and follows food safety procedures.
INSPECTION PREPARATION: Support to ensure you are fully prepared for PVD inspections.
ONGOING SUPPORT: Continuous guidance to maintain compliance and adapt as your business grows.
sections.note: Designed specifically for small and medium-sized food businesses, ISOlogic provides practical, proportionate and cost-effective HACCP support tailored to your operation.
sections.ctaText: Starting a new food business? Get in touch for practical, affordable food safety support tailored to your needs.

sections.title: Lead Auditing Services
sections.subtitle: Specialised leadership for supply chains (second party) and third party requirements.
sections.description: Beyond consultancy, we provide high-level auditing expertise for accredited Certification Bodies and international organisations. As a certified Lead Auditor (CQI and IRCA Certified) we conduct:
items: Third-Party Audits: Partnering with international Certification Bodies to perform independent compliance assessments and certification audits (e.g., ISO 9001, etc.)
Second-Party (Supplier) Audits: Helping organisations mitigate risk by conducting deep-dive audits of their critical suppliers to ensure quality and compliance across the entire supply chain.
extraParagraphs: Available as a freelance and contract ISO Lead Auditor for third-party ISO certification audits, supplier audits and external auditing assignments across Latvia and Europe.

CQI & IRCA certified ISO auditor providing services to certification bodies and organisations seeking qualified lead auditors for ISO 9001 and other management system standards. Engagements are delivered on a contract or assignment basis, tailored to certification body and organisational requirements.

standardsSection.title: Стандарты, с которыми мы работаем
items: ISO 9001 (система менеджмента качества)
EN 9100 / AS9100 (авиация, космическая и оборонная отрасли)
ISO 14001 (экологический менеджмент)
ISO 27001 (информационная безопасность)
ISO 45001 (охрана труда и промышленная безопасность)
ISO 22000 / HACCP (система менеджмента безопасности пищевой продукции)

whyOutsourceSection.title: Почему стоит передать ISO на аутсорсинг?
whyOutsourceSection.intro: Внутреннее управление ISO нередко приводит к тому, что система становится формальностью, а не инструментом эффективности. Сотрудничество с ISOLogic — более гибкое и устойчивое решение:
items: Экономия затрат: доступ к компетенциям ведущего аудитора без содержания штатного специалиста
Непрерывность: минимизируется риск потери сертификации при уходе ключевого сотрудника
Независимость: объективная оценка, которой доверяют сертификационные органы
Фокус на бизнесе: команда концентрируется на ключевых задачах, а не на администрировании
Свежий взгляд: лучшие практики из европейских отраслей для выявления неэффективностей
Международный охват и мультиязычная поддержка: работа на русском, латышском и английском языках
